summary: Verified progress calculation consistency fix. All tests passed - Employee list percentage (81%) now matches Employee Profile percentage (81%) for Olakunle Alonge. The unified calculation function correctly excludes optional items (Equal Opportunities) from both numerator and denominator, counts acknowledgements (Contract/Handbook) as completed AND verified, and properly detects form-generated requirements with uploaded documents.

✅ Acknowledgements (Contract/Handbook) count as completed AND verified

✅ Multiple employees tested - all show consistent percentages
